title: Replace slider with yes/no buttons for check-in questions

requirements.text: Replace the existing slider control in the daily check-in form with two clickable buttons labeled 'Yes' and 'No' for each question

quotes: The checkin questions should have clickable buttons for yes and for no rather than the slide

acceptanceCriteria: Each check-in question displays two distinct clickable buttons: one for 'Yes' and one for 'No'
The selected button is visually highlighted to indicate the user's choice
The buttons maintain the same functionality as the current slider (storing true/false values)
The button controls are keyboard accessible and meet accessibility standards
All existing check-in questions use the new button interface consistently

constraints: Maintain the existing data structure for check-in answers (boolean values)
Preserve all existing form validation and submission logic
Do not modify the backend API or data models
